summary: Iteration 75: Tested runtime verification system for post-patch verification. All 39 tests passed (18 unit tests for generateRuntimeTestScript/generateInteractionTests/buildVerifiedPatchResponse + 21 integration tests for message-stream.js/stream-client.js/Dashboard.jsx/RightPanel.jsx/PreviewTab.jsx). The runtime verification system correctly implements: (1) generateRuntimeTestScript produces valid JavaScript with DOM checks, input simulation, click simulation, and postMessage reporting; (2) generateInteractionTests detects sidebar navigation and state preview inputs; (3) buildVerifiedPatchResponse handles three-tier status (VERIFIED, CODE_VERIFIED_ONLY, NOT_VERIFIED); (4) buildVerifiedResponseWithRuntime helper wraps all completion sites and yields runtime_tests events; (5) stream-client.js handles runtime_tests event type; (6) Dashboard.jsx wires runtimeTestScript state and onRuntimeTests callback; (7) PreviewTab.jsx injects test scripts and displays verification badge/results panel.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Runtime verification system fully tested. The system implements three-tier status (VERIFIED, CODE_VERIFIED_ONLY, NOT_VERIFIED). generateRuntimeTestScript creates JS that runs inside the preview iframe with DOM checks, input simulation, sidebar click simulation, and postMessage reporting. buildVerifiedResponseWithRuntime wraps all completion sites in message-stream.js. PreviewTab.jsx injects the test script and displays verification badge (green VERIFIED or amber X/Y) and results panel. Login was not tested due to Supabase auth configuration.
